items.title: Named owners for external APIs are not confirmed.
items.detail: Dependency follow-up and defect triage may stall.
items.action: Confirm named owner for each system/API.

items.title: Proposal PDF is missing from repository.
items.detail: Source traceability gap for proposal-derived assumptions.
items.action: Upload/link approved proposal or accept existing review as sufficient reference.

items.title: Clarification source is incomplete as standalone artifact.
items.detail: Architecture may rely on clarification content that is not independently traceable.
items.action: Add approved clarification source or decision entries.

items.title: PII field-level mapping is incomplete.
items.detail: PDPA, consent, deletion, and vendor sharing risks remain uncontrolled.
items.action: Create approved PII/consent field matrix per API/system.

items.title: BZB conflict and wrong-merge correction process is not operationally defined.
items.detail: Account merge errors may require ad hoc backend fixes.
items.action: Define correction runbook, approval, and audit trail.

items.title: FS is a multi-service dependency without per-service SLA/error contract.
items.detail: Parking, visitor, elevator, turnstile, workplace, and traffic may fail inconsistently.
items.action: Split FS API ownership and define SLA, timeout, retry, and error catalog per service.

items.title: QR single-use/replay behavior is not confirmed.
items.detail: Access control may be weaker or inconsistent for visitors.
items.action: Decide reusable-window versus single-use policy.

items.title: FS outage behavior for turnstile/elevator is undefined.
items.detail: Physical access may fail during network/system outage.
items.action: Define online validation outage policy and site fallback.

items.title: Argento/FS/OBK payment reconciliation details are incomplete.
items.detail: Paid-but-unsynced parking tickets and refund disputes may occur.
items.action: Define idempotency, reconciliation, refund, and support escalation.

items.title: CMS Phase 1 seed account may expose broader OBK data.
items.detail: Data isolation and operational access risk.
items.action: Decide compensating control or risk acceptance.

items.title: Notification segment ownership and cleanup verification are not defined.
items.detail: Wrong audience or stale data after deletion.
items.action: Assign segment owner and cleanup validation.

items.title: Kafka/Event Bus retry and dead-letter behavior is unknown.
items.detail: Permanent-delete cleanup may silently fail.
items.action: Confirm topic schema, consumers, retry, DLQ, replay.

items.title: SIT/UAT/PVT readiness lacks endpoint, data, and hardware dates.
items.detail: Quinn cannot finalize planning or dependency gating.
items.action: Provide environment readiness tracker with owners and dates.

items.title: Phase 1.5 OCR/rate config dependencies may cause rework if deferred too far.
items.owner: PARQ / Simon / FS / CMS / TCCT TBD
items.detail: Parking e-stamp and fee calculation may need retrofit.
items.action: Reserve Phase 1.5 data model and ownership decisions early.

items.title: BMS non-blocking login refresh has unresolved controls.
items.detail: Users may enter app but see stale/missing Workplace persona or require unclear support path.
items.action: Define endpoint/payload, timeout, circuit-breaker, cache/source, support, PII, audit.

items.title: SSO
items.detail: Authentication and identity orchestration
items.action: Owner, token/error contract, environment readiness

items.title: IAM
items.detail: Local member profile and persona entitlement
items.action: Profile overwrite policy, deletion orchestration, BMS mutation rules

items.title: BMS
items.detail: Member lookup, non-blocking login refresh, cleanup consumer
items.action: Endpoint/payload, timeout, previous-permission source, audit, PII

items.title: FS / Iviva
items.detail: Workplace, parking, visitor, elevator, turnstile, traffic authority
items.action: Split service owners, SLAs, error catalog, hardware readiness

items.title: BZB / Buzzee Bee
items.detail: Retail identity and privilege source
items.action: Duplicate handling, wrong-merge correction, deferrable behavior

items.title: Argento
items.detail: Payment gateway and refund execution
items.action: Callback security, idempotency, reconciliation, refund process

items.title: CMS
items.detail: Admin visibility and operational tooling
items.action: Seed admin scope, RBAC/org filtering, compensating controls

items.title: Kafka / Event Bus
items.detail: Async cleanup/event distribution
items.action: Schema, producer/consumer SLA, retry, DLQ, replay

items.title: Notification Infrastructure
items.detail: PARQ targeting and device/inbox cleanup
items.action: Segment owner, token cleanup, validation

items.title: Elevator System
items.detail: Physical access hardware
items.action: Hardware test environment, floor mapping, timeout/fallback

items.title: Turnstile System
items.detail: Physical access hardware
items.action: Outage policy, latency threshold, audit retention

items.title: TCCT OCR
items.detail: Phase 1.5 ticket recognition
items.action: API owner, sample data, image retention, confidence thresholds
